tasks.prompt:
Generate today's GitHub Trending Daily report:

1. WebFetch https://github.com/trending to get today's trending repos
2. For the top 10 projects, generate Chinese deep analysis (what / why_hot / tech_stack / use_cases / audience / verdict)
3. Create YYYY-MM-DD/trending-data.json with the data
4. Copy and adapt dashboard.html from 2026-06-09/ as template, replace date and data
5. Update manifest.json - insert new entry at top of reports array
6. Git commit and push

Follow the project conventions in CLAUDE.md.
